conditions: CloudTrail trusted access is enabled and the trail is configured as an organization trail.
decision_context: Use when central audit coverage and new-account onboarding are requirements.
exclusions: Event selectors and Region settings still determine which event classes and Regions are logged.

source_references.locator: Creating a trail for an organization, overview
source_references.supported_proposition: Organization trails provide organization-wide event coverage that extends to new accounts.

statement: A CloudTrail organization trail logs events for the management account and all member accounts, including accounts added to the organization after the trail is created.
